title: Dragon Boat Festival Story
prompt: Describe the traditions of the Dragon Boat Festival and explain their origins.
hint: Talk about rice dumplings, dragon boat races, and the story of Qu Yuan.
sample: During the Dragon Boat Festival, people eat rice dumplings and watch dragon boat races to honor the poet Qu Yuan, who drowned himself in the Milo River.

zh.prompt: 描述端午節的傳統並解釋其起源。
zh.hint: 談談粽子、龍舟賽和屈原的故事。
zh.sample: 端午節期間，人們吃粽子並觀看龍舟賽，以紀念投江自盡的詩人屈原。

title: Qu Yuan's Loyalty
prompt: Explain why Qu Yuan is remembered and honored during the Dragon Boat Festival.
hint: Mention his loyalty to his country, his poetry, and his tragic death.
sample: Qu Yuan was a loyal poet who tried to save his country. When he was exiled and his homeland was destroyed, he drowned himself in the Milo River. People honor his loyalty by celebrating the Dragon Boat Festival.

zh.prompt: 解釋為什麼屈原在端午節被紀念和尊敬。
zh.hint: 提到他對國家的忠誠、他的詩歌和悲劇性的死亡。
zh.sample: 屈原是一位忠誠的詩人，試圖拯救他的國家。當他被流放且家園被毀時，他投江自盡。人們通過慶祝端午節來紀念他的忠誠。

title: Dragon Boat Festival Activities
prompt: List and describe the activities people do during the Dragon Boat Festival.
hint: Include eating rice dumplings, dragon boat races, and making loud noises to scare fish.
sample: People eat rice dumplings to feed the fish so they won't eat Qu Yuan's body, race dragon boats to scare fish away, and beat drums to make loud noises during the Dragon Boat Festival.

title: Meaning of Rice Dumplings
prompt: Explain the significance of rice dumplings during the Dragon Boat Festival.
hint: Discuss how rice dumplings were used to protect Qu Yuan's body and their delicious flavors today.
sample: Rice dumplings were thrown into the river to feed the fish so they wouldn't eat Qu Yuan's body. Today, people enjoy many delicious flavors of rice dumplings during the festival.
